title: Agent Gateway RPC Turn
objective: Send a simple user message through `openclaw agent` without `--local`, forcing the CLI to cross the Gateway agent RPC boundary and prove final response, provider timing, gateway health, and process containment.

phases.title: Provision Gateway Env
phases.intent: Start a disposable OpenClaw gateway before sending the Gateway RPC agent turn.

phases.title: Gateway Agent Turn
phases.intent: Send a user message through the Gateway-backed OpenClaw agent CLI path.
commands: ocm @{env} -- agent --agent main --session-id kova-agent-gateway-rpc --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --thinking off --timeout 120 --json

phases.title: Post-Agent Gateway Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after the Gateway RPC agent turn.
